use_cases: Toggle premium feature access in SaaS applications
Enable or disable settings and user preferences
Switch between light/dark or other mode toggles
Use as filter toggles in e-commerce product listings
Create on/off states for feature flags in dashboards
ai_summary: A polished toggle switch component with bouncy animations, gradient track styling, and subtle glow effects when active. Features smooth press states and hover feedback, making it ideal for premium feature gates and settings interfaces in SaaS or e-commerce platforms.
